text: AI is rapidly changing the modern workplace, primarily through automation. Many repetitive tasks, like data entry and scheduling, are now handled by software, freeing employees for more creative work. Productivity tools have also become smarter, helping teams analyse large amounts of data quickly and improving decision-making. However, the most exciting shift is human-AI collaboration. Rather than replacing people, AI often works alongside them, offering suggestions and handling routine parts of a job. This means roles are evolving, but not disappearing entirely. Workers need to adapt by learning new skills, such as how to use these tools effectively. Ultimately, the future workplace will rely on a partnership between human creativity and machine efficiency.
